channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Burry Called a Bubble Days Ago and Now AI & EV Stocks Are Already Cracking
item.description: Michael Burry warned of an AI bubble on June 30. Days later, memory and storage stocks, and Tesla are sliding on fresh valuation fears.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise After Tesla, Sandisk, AI Stocks Dive; Apple, Robinhood Flash Buy Signals
item.description: The stock market had strong weekly gains, but it didn't feel that way with Sandisk and other AI plays selling off Thursday.

item.title: Tesla Will Reach 10 Million Cumulative Sales This Quarter
item.description: Tesla just had its 4th best quarter ever for vehicle sales. Stepping away from quarterly trends and quarterly numbers, though, I also routinely publish cumulative Tesla sales charts and facts. Looking at the numbers just now, I noticed that Tesla is on the verge of reaching 10 million cumulative ...

item.title: Why Did Tesla’s Stock Drop 7% Despite a Record Delivery Quarter?
item.description: Tesla stock sank 7% despite crushing Q2 delivery estimates, reversing an 8% FSD-driven rally from days earlier.

item.title: Tesla Has Its 4th Best Quarter Ever
item.description: Tesla sales rebounded, and strongly, in the second quarter. In fact, looking historically at Tesla quarterly sales (which I publish every quarter), you can see that the 2nd quarter of 2026 was Tesla’s 4th best quarter ever in terms of vehicle deliveries — 480,126 Tesla vehicles were delivered to ...

item.title: Tesla caps employee AI spending at $200/week except for Grok
item.description: Tesla told staff it will impose a $200-per-week limit on employee AI spending starting July 6, according to an internal memo reported by The Information (paywall). The cap lands just months after Tesla pushed employees to use AI more aggressively, a sign that even companies betting their future o...

item.title: TSLA Stock Clocks Worst Day In 11 Months After Q2 Delivery Blows Past Estimates — Investors And Experts Weigh In
item.description: Earlier on Thursday, Tesla said that it delivered 480,126 vehicles in Q2 2026, beating the sell-side consensus of around 406,000 by roughly 18%.

item.title: Why Tesla (TSLA) Shares Are Getting Obliterated Today
item.description: Shares of electric vehicle pioneer Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) fell 7.1% in the afternoon session after it snapped a four-session run-up despite a delivery report that beat expectations by a wide margin.

item.title: Popular Tesla investor blames Trump for Bitcoin crash
item.description: Popular Tesla (Nasdaq: TSLA) investor and Gerber Kawasaki Wealth & Investment Management CEO Ross Gerber doesn't mince his words, whether discussing Elon Musk's priorities or the crypto market. As it emerged that U.S. President Donald Trump made a profit of $1.2 billion ...

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Dow Hits High But AI Tumbles; Apple, Robinhood Are Buys As Tesla, Sandisk Dive
item.description: The stock market had strong weekly gains, but it didn't feel that way with Sandisk and other AI plays selling off Thursday.

item.title: Tesla: Why The Share Price Slump Sends A Clear Message
Tesla deliveries beat forecasts as Europe's rebound brightens outlook
item.description: The EV maker delivered a record 480,126 vehicles in the second quarter, topping Wall Street forecasts as a rebound in Europe fueled hopes Tesla can return to annual growth.

item.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Runs 590 Points To New High But Meta, Chip, Optical Stocks Slammed
item.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index bolts higher in a mixed finish Thursday. Tesla stock skids despite strong quarterly deliveries.

item.title: Tesla's Latest Deliveries Report Exceeded Expectations. TSLA Stock Is Falling Anyway.
item.description: Tesla stock sinks as profitability concerns outweigh the strong Q2 delivery report. Oppenheimer continues to recommend caution on TSLA shares.

item.title: Tesla Quarterly Deliveries Jump 25%. Here’s Why the Stock Fell Anyway.
item.description: Tesla reported 2026 electric vehicle deliveries that came in ahead of consensus estimates.

item.title: Tesla Deliveries Soar To 480,126 In Q2; But EV Giant's Stock Tumbles (Live Coverage)
item.description: Second-quarter Tesla deliveries rose much more than expected in Q2, well above Q1 and a year earlier. Tesla stock fell from near a buy point.

item.title: Why SpaceX’s Valuation Is ‘Catastrophic’
item.description: SpaceX stock rose Thursday despite a couple of new Wall Street reports that just aren’t very bullish. Shares of Elon Musk’s rocket and AI company rose 2.8%, closing at $162, while the was flat and the rose 1.1%. The moves came after Daiwa analyst Jonathan Kees launched coverage with a Hold rat...

item.title: Tesla blows past Q2 delivery forecasts, but the stock is falling
item.description: Tesla's (TSLA) EV deliveries for its second quarter blew the doors off Wall Street expectations, reporting 480,126 deliveries compared to the Bloomberg consensus of 397,466. Despite showing 34% quarter-over-quarter growth, the stock is moving lower ahead of Thursday's market close. Yahoo Finance ...

item.title: Tesla Just Smoked Its Delivery Number by 74,000 Cars and Nobody Saw It Coming
item.description: Phil LeBeau went on CNBC Thursday morning and delivered the kind of number that reorders a Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) week. “These are far better than the street was expecting for the second quarter. Tesla delivering almost 481,000 vehicles,” he said.

item.title: BYD Reclaimed The EV Sales Crown Despite Tesla's Huge Quarter
item.description: Tesla posted one of its strongest quarters yet, but BYD still managed to reclaim the global EV sales crown.

item.title: Tesla Delivers 480,126 Vehicles, Beating Estimates by a Wide Margin
item.description: Second-quarter deliveries rose 25% year over year, though BYD remained the global EV sales leader.

item.title: Tesla's Q2 Delivery Report Just Landed. Here Are 3 Key Takeaways for Investors.
item.description: The report shows Tesla's automotive business is reclaiming its momentum.

item.title: Model YL available now in US
item.description: Available to order now in US and Puerto Rico submitted by /u/DaWiz12_ [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla brings Model Y L ‘Launch Series’ to the U.S. at $61,990
item.description: Tesla has officially launched the Model Y L in the United States and Puerto Rico for $61,990. It is the longer-wheelbase version of the Model Y, and has been available in China since last year. Tesla brings the Model Y L to the U.S.

item.title: Tesla launches Model Y L in US — 6 seats, 325 miles, $61,990
item.description: Tesla has launched the Model Y L, its stretched, three-row, six-seat SUV, in the US and Puerto Rico. The automaker confirmed the launch on Thursday, with the vehicle now configurable online. The Model Y L arrives first as a “Launch Series” priced at $61,990 — more than Tesla’s own Model Y Perform...

item.title: New Model Y L Long Wheelbase available in USA
item.description: Ordering now! submitted by /u/smu1892 [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla Closes Above $420 for First Time, Retail Buying May Accelerate
item.description: Vanda data show five-day retail net buying averages rose from $87 million to $135 million above $420.

item.title: SpaceX IPO Fireworks Are Triumph Of American Innovation, But China Threat Looms
item.description: The U.S. innovation engine, from the Model T to SpaceX and AI, continues to be a rocket for America's economy. But China is a growing rival.

item.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Sinks As Tech Leaders Sandisk, Tesla, TTM Tech Slump; Dow Climbs (Live Coverage)
item.description: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index rises in mixed trade Thursday. Tesla stock skids despite strong Q2 deliveries.

item.title: Michael Burry's newest short reveals what really worries him about AI
item.description: The AI trade isn’t just about Nvidia anymore. That could be the true warning sign underlying Michael Burry’s current move on the markets. The investor behind "The Big Short" has revealed new bearish positions against Tesla (TSLA), Nvidia (NVDA), Caterpillar (CAT), Applied Materials (AMAT), and th...

item.title: Tesla Second-Quarter Deliveries Top Views; Shares Fall Intraday
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) shares were down Thursday even as the company's second-quarter deliveries beat Wall Str

item.title: Tesla global auto sales jump 25% in 2nd quarter, beating expectations
item.description: Tesla reported a jump in second-quarter auto sales Thursday, as Elon Musk's electric vehicle company easily topped expectations in a period of lofty gasoline prices due to the US-Iran war.Also Thursday, Ford reported 10 percent drop in US auto sales to 549,200, reflecting vehicle phaseouts, lower...

item.title: Tesla, Rivian, Strategy, Moderna, Sandisk, Blue Owl, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
item.description: FEATURE Stocks traded mixed Thursday following a jobs report that showed the U.S. labor market grew at a slower pace in June. Strategy advanced 6.3% as higher cryptocurrencies prices boosted the largest corporate holder of Bitcoin Robinhood Markets rose 4.

item.title: Why Patience Is The Real Catalyst For Tesla Stock
item.description: The electric vehicle maker's shares carry a premium price, but the real question is whether you believe in the growth that makes them cheaper down the road.

item.title: Tesla just told us twice that Model Y L is coming to the U.S.
item.description: Tesla just told us twice that the Model Y L is coming to the U.S., and two social media posts definitely just tipped the company’s hand, as if they wanted it to be any other way. The two social media posts basically confirm that the slightly longer version of the Model Y will be heading to the Un...

item.title: Tesla Sales Roared Back In Q2, After Months Of Downward Spiraling
item.description: The automaker saw a massive spike in second quarter sales despite rocky demand for EVs in the U.S.

item.title: Good News For Tesla Stock Investors
item.description: Tesla Scores Major Win as U.S. Closes Safety Probe Into 695,000 Vehicles

item.title: Tesla Sales Blow Away Expectations. Why the Stock Is Dropping.
item.description: FEATURE The stock market remains undefeated in frustrating investors. Tesla’s delivery results are the latest example. Tesla reported exceptional second-quarter delivery results on Thursday.

item.title: Top Midday Stories: June Jobs Report Comes in Well Below Expectations; Tesla Q2 Deliveries Jump 25% Year Over Year to 480,126 Vehicles
item.description: Wall Street's major market averages were mixed in late-morning trading Thursday, as investors reacte

item.title: Stock Market Rebounds, But AI Falters; Meta, Tesla, Jobs Report In Focus: Weekly Review
item.description: The key indexes had strong weekly gains, but AI stocks faltered amid Meta buzz. Tesla fell on a blowout deliveries report.

item.title: Elon Musk shuts down ‘4D chess’ theory on Tesla Optimus production
item.description: Elon Musk has directly rejected a popular fan theory that Tesla is secretly further ahead on Optimus than it lets on, warning instead that production of its humanoid robot “will be extremely slow at first.” The comment cuts against a bullish narrative that Tesla’s quiet stretch on Optimus is a st...

item.title: Tesla is using vehicle microphones to improve build quality: here’s how
item.description: Tesla is using the vehicles’ internal microphones to improve build quality, Vice President of Engineering Lars Moravy revealed recently. It’s no secret that Tesla is always finding ways to make its manufacturing operations more efficient, accurate, and valuable. Constantly trying to make its cars...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Q2 2026 deliveries jump 25% to 480,126, beating estimates
item.description: Tesla delivered 480,126 vehicles in the second quarter of 2026, up 25% from the same quarter a year ago and roughly 74,000 vehicles above Wall Street’s consensus estimate. It’s Tesla’s strongest second quarter ever and its first year-over-year delivery growth after two straight years of decline.

item.title: Tesla reports blowout Q2 deliveries of 480K, easily topping estimates
item.description: submitted by /u/THATS_LEGIT_BRO [link] [comments]

item.title: Tesla crushes Wall Street expectations, beats delivery estimates by over 15 percent
item.description: Tesla ( NASDAQ: TSLA ) beat Wall Street expectations of 406,000 vehicles delivered in Q2 by reporting 480,126 deliveries for the three months ending in June. Tesla reported it delivered 467,762 Model 3 and Model Y units, while 12,364 Model S, Model X, and Cybertrucks switched hands during the qu...

item.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise With Tesla, Jobs Report Ahead
item.description: Stocks fell as Meta buzz hit SpaceX, Micron and many AI stocks. Tesla is near a buy point with deliveries due. The June jobs report also is on tap.

item.title: Market Chatter: Tesla Vehicles Cleared as US Regulator Closes Deceleration Probe
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) has been cleared after the US National Highway Traffic Safety Administration closed its

item.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500, Dow Futures Subdued Ahead Of June Jobs Report: Why TSLA, MU, NBIS, NVDA, SMCI, IREN Are In Focus
item.description: Stocktwits data showed retail sentiment around SPY and QQQ is ‘bullish.’

item.title: TSLA Stock Slips Overnight: Tesla Model Y L Rumors Heat Up After ‘Long Weekend’ Tease As Investors Await Q2 Deliveries
item.description: The Model Y L is a stretched six-seat Model Y with more rear-seat space, a longer wheelbase, and a 2+2+2 layout.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Techs Rise With Tesla, Jobs Report Ahead; Meta Jumps On AI Move
item.description: Stocks fell as Meta buzz hit SpaceX, Micron and many AI stocks. Tesla is near a buy point with deliveries due. The June jobs report also is on tap.
